scenes.must_show: 狗狗独特的发型和低角度视角
scenes.image_prompt: A small poodle with a red mohawk sitting on green grass, low angle, looking at camera, sunny day, photorealistic UGC style.
scenes.video_prompt: Handheld low-angle shot of a small poodle with a red mohawk sitting on green grass, looking at the camera, natural sunlight, ABSOLUTELY NO BGM.
scenes.color_grading: 高饱和度，鲜艳的绿色和红色
scenes.character_desc: 红色发型的小型泰迪犬
scenes.action_blocking: 狗狗静坐，头部轻微晃动
scenes.original_script: Hi, I'm small, but the bugs outside are not.
scenes.rewritten_script: Hi, I'm small, but the bugs outside are not.
scenes.visual_description: 狗狗在草地上自我介绍
scenes.constraints_real_shoot: 确保狗狗配合看向镜头
scenes.on_screen_text_graphics: 黄色加粗字幕: HI, I'M SMALL,
scenes.visual_content_description: 一只带有红色莫西干发型的泰迪犬坐在绿草地上，直视镜头。

scenes.image_prompt: A hand placing an orange supplement jar labeled '[user product]' on green grass, close-up, sunny day, UGC style.
scenes.product_desc: 橙色圆形塑料罐，带有狗狗图案标签
scenes.video_prompt: Close-up of a hand placing an orange jar into the grass and then opening the lid, bright natural light, handheld, ABSOLUTELY NO BGM.
scenes.color_grading: 橙色包装与绿色草地形成对比
scenes.original_script: My mother has decided I needed protection. These are Zesty Paws Flea and Tick Bites.
scenes.rewritten_script: My mother has decided I needed protection. These are [user product].
scenes.visual_description: 展示产品包装和开盖过程
scenes.visual_content_description: 一只手将橙色的[user product]包装罐放在草丛中，随后镜头切到手部打开盖子。

scenes.must_show: 主人、狗狗、产品三者合影
scenes.image_prompt: A young woman with glasses smiling, holding a small dog and an orange supplement jar, outdoor park background, selfie style, UGC.
scenes.video_prompt: A woman holding a dog and a product jar, talking to the camera with a big smile, outdoor setting, handheld selfie shot, ABSOLUTELY NO BGM.
scenes.character_desc: 戴眼镜的年轻女性，笑容灿烂
scenes.original_script: If you love your dog and also love not dealing with fleas, get these on TikTok Shop.
scenes.rewritten_script: If you love your dog and also love not dealing with fleas, get these on TikTok Shop.
scenes.editing_transition: 淡出或硬切到黑底图标
scenes.visual_description: 主人出镜推荐并引导购买
scenes.on_screen_text_graphics: 字幕: GET THESE ON TIKTOK SHOP
scenes.visual_content_description: 年轻女性抱着狗狗，另一只手拿着产品罐，对着镜头微笑。最后画面出现TikTok Shop图标。

beat_map.visual: 一只染了红色莫西干发型的泰迪犬坐在草地上，镜头低角度平视。
beat_map.function: 利用可爱的宠物形象和拟人化口吻吸引注意力，引出“虫子”威胁。
beat_map.dialogue_or_text: Hi, I'm small, but the bugs outside are not.
beat_map.replication_note: 必须保持低角度拍摄，让观众进入宠物视角。
beat_map.rewritten_dialogue_or_text: Hi, I'm small, but the bugs outside are not.

beat_map.visual: 空镜展示草地，随后切回狗狗在湖边看风景，表现潜在威胁。
beat_map.function: 具象化痛点（草丛里的敌人），引出购买动机（母亲的保护）。
beat_map.dialogue_or_text: There are enemies in the grass. My mother has decided I needed protection.
beat_map.replication_note: 画面要展示狗狗与环境的关系。
beat_map.rewritten_dialogue_or_text: There are enemies in the grass. My mother has decided I needed protection.

beat_map.visual: 手部将产品放在草地上，随后展示开盖、取出心形颗粒并喂给狗狗。
beat_map.function: 展示产品外观、质地和使用过程（喂食），建立产品认知。
beat_map.dialogue_or_text: These are Zesty Paws Flea and Tick Bites. Apparently, they help keep fleas and ticks away,
beat_map.replication_note: 特写镜头展示产品细节，喂食动作要自然。
beat_map.rewritten_dialogue_or_text: These are [user product]. Apparently, they help keep fleas and ticks away,

beat_map.visual: 狗狗在草丛边自信地行走、探索。
beat_map.function: 展示使用产品后的结果：宠物可以自由玩耍，消除顾虑。
beat_map.dialogue_or_text: so now I can roll in things with confidence.
beat_map.replication_note: 表现出宠物的活泼与自信。
beat_map.rewritten_dialogue_or_text: so now I can roll in things with confidence.

beat_map.visual: 主人抱着狗狗，手持产品对着镜头灿烂微笑，最后切到产品特写和TikTok Shop图标。
beat_map.function: 真人出镜增加信任感，明确购买渠道，发出行动指令。
beat_map.dialogue_or_text: If you love your dog and also love not dealing with fleas, get these on TikTok Shop.
beat_map.replication_note: 笑容要真诚，产品展示要清晰。
beat_map.rewritten_dialogue_or_text: If you love your dog and also love not dealing with fleas, get these on TikTok Shop.

clip_plan.notes: Suggested max-15s clip window. Gemini may move the boundary to the nearest natural beat as long as each clip remains <=15s, clips stay continuous, and panel_range is updated from the same global storyboard grid.

clips.prompt:
### Clip 1
Clip info and SRT: Dog introduces the bug problem and the solution starts appearing.
Timeline: 00:00-00:10
Storyboard panels: Panel 1 to Panel 8
Matched SRT: "Hi, I'm small, but the bugs outside are not. There are enemies in the grass. My mother has decided I needed protection. These are [user product]."
Visual audit: Low-angle handheld shot of a small dog on green grass. Quick cuts between the dog looking around and the grass. A hand places an orange product jar on the grass. Close-up of the jar.
Generation Prompt: A small cute dog with a unique hairstyle sitting on a sunny lawn, low-angle POV shot, handheld camera movement. The dog looks slightly concerned. Cut to a fast panning shot of tall grass. Cut back to the dog by a lake. A human hand enters the frame and places an orange supplement jar labeled '[user product]' into the grass. The lighting is bright natural sunlight, photorealistic UGC style.
[Sequence Details: Panel 1 Dog sitting -> Panel 2 Close up dog -> Panel 3 Grass POV -> Panel 4 Dog by water -> Panel 5 Hand placing jar -> Panel 6 Jar in grass -> Panel 7 Hand opening jar -> Panel 8 Showing treat.]
[Global Visual Anchor: @Image2 is the single full-video storyboard contact sheet; follow only Panel 1 to Panel 8 for composition, shot order, and rhythm.]
[Audio/Action Cues: Voice Profile: Cute, slightly raspy dog-like male voice. Timed Voiceover: Matches the SRT. Ambient Foley: Birds chirping, wind rustling grass. ABSOLUTELY NO BGM, NO BACKGROUND MUSIC. Pure voice/dialogue and ambient foley only.]
clips.end_state: 展示出产品颗粒，准备喂食。
clips.start_state: 狗狗坐在草地上，准备开始叙述。
clips.handoff_to_next: 手部捏着一颗心形颗粒，靠近狗狗的嘴部。

clips.prompt:
### Clip 2
Clip info and SRT: Feeding the treat, dog walking confidently, and final CTA with owner.
Timeline: 00:10-00:19
Storyboard panels: Panel 9 to Panel 15
Matched SRT: "Apparently, they help keep fleas and ticks away, so now I can roll in things with confidence. If you love your dog and also love not dealing with fleas, get these on TikTok Shop."
Visual audit: Close-up of the dog eating the heart-shaped treat. Cut to the dog walking happily on a leash. Final shot is a selfie-style shot of a smiling woman holding the dog and the product jar.
Generation Prompt: Close-up of a hand feeding a heart-shaped brown treat to the small dog. The dog licks its lips. Cut to the dog walking energetically on a sidewalk next to grass, low-angle following shot. Final scene: A young woman with glasses smiles at the camera in a selfie-style shot, holding the small dog in one arm and the orange [user product] jar in the other hand. Outdoor park background. Bright, happy atmosphere, handheld phone quality.
[Sequence Details: Panel 9 Feeding -> Panel 10 Dog eating -> Panel 11 Dog walking -> Panel 12 Dog sniffing grass -> Panel 13 Owner holding dog and jar -> Panel 14 Close up treat -> Panel 15 Final CTA screen.]
[Global Visual Anchor: @Image2 is the single full-video storyboard contact sheet; follow only Panel 9 to Panel 15 for composition, shot order, and rhythm.]
[Audio/Action Cues: Voice Profile: Transition from dog voice to a friendly, enthusiastic female voice at 00:14. Timed Voiceover: Matches the SRT. Ambient Foley: Dog walking sounds, outdoor park ambience. ABSOLUTELY NO BGM, NO BACKGROUND MUSIC. Pure voice/dialogue and ambient foley only.]
clips.end_state: 画面停留在主人、狗狗和产品的合影，随后出现购买图标。
clips.start_state: 承接上段，手持颗粒准备喂食。

clone_prompt.global_style_rules: UGC风格，手持拍摄，自然日光，低角度视角，色彩明亮，画面有轻微生活化抖动。
clone_prompt.global_negative_rules: ABSOLUTELY NO BGM, NO BACKGROUND MUSIC. 避免电影感滤镜，不要过度磨皮，不要出现拼贴画面。
clone_prompt.dialogue_adaptation_rules: 保持第一人称拟人化口吻，语气轻松幽默，结尾转为真诚的真人建议。

what_transfers: 从宠物独白到主人出镜的结构转换
明亮的户外自然光质感
defining_traits: 拟人化视角：全程以狗狗的口吻叙事，增强趣味性和代入感。
高频切镜：19秒内包含10次以上剪辑，保持视觉新鲜感。
色彩反差：狗狗独特的红色发型与绿色草地形成强烈视觉冲击。

viral_mechanism.core_idea: 将枯燥的驱虫药广告转化为有趣的宠物生活Vlog。
trust_devices: 主人真人出镜微笑背书
attention_triggers: 红色莫西干发型的狗狗
第一人称“Hi, I'm small”开场
conversion_devices: 针对爱犬人士的情感绑架（If you love your dog）

cta.summary: 主人出镜背书，引导购买。
cta.mechanism: 情感诉求（If you love your dog）+ 明确指令。
cta.replication_note: 真人与宠物的互动要温馨自然。

hook.summary: 狗狗自我介绍并指出户外虫子威胁。
hook.mechanism: 拟人化+可爱宠物形象，快速建立情感连接。
hook.replication_note: 口播第一句要直接点出矛盾点（Small vs Big bugs）。

climax.summary: 产品登场，展示喂食过程及狗狗的自信状态。
climax.mechanism: 解决方案展示+利益点说明。
climax.replication_note: 心形颗粒的特写是关键视觉记忆点。

buildup.summary: 展示草地环境，强调“敌人”无处不在。
buildup.mechanism: 环境渲染，强化痛点感知。
buildup.replication_note: 镜头要快速切换，营造一种不安感。

what_gets_swapped: 原品牌 Zesty Paws 替换为 [user product]
具体的背景环境（可根据实际拍摄地调整）
detailedBreakdown.full_original_script: Hi, I'm small, but the bugs outside are not. There are enemies in the grass. My mother has decided I needed protection. These are Zesty Paws Flea and Tick Bites. Apparently, they help keep fleas and ticks away, so now I can roll in things with confidence. If you love your dog and also love not dealing with fleas, get these on TikTok Shop.
detailedBreakdown.full_rewritten_script: Hi, I'm small, but the bugs outside are not. There are enemies in the grass. My mother has decided I needed protection. These are [user product]. Apparently, they help keep fleas and ticks away, so now I can roll in things with confidence. If you love your dog and also love not dealing with fleas, get these on TikTok Shop.

source_video_analysis.edit_rhythm: 快节奏切分，配合口播停顿进行画面跳转，每1-2秒一个镜头。
source_video_analysis.product_role: 作为“保护者”出现，解决宠物在户外活动的安全隐患。
source_video_analysis.camera_language: 手持拍摄，低角度（宠物高度）视角，包含特写与中景切换。
source_video_analysis.dialogue_pattern: 第一人称拟人化叙事，从宠物视角引出痛点，再由主人介入提供解决方案，最后转为真人背书。
source_video_analysis.technical_texture: 自然日光，手机拍摄质感，轻微抖动，色彩明亮饱和。
